networkfirewall.firewallpolicy.dimension:
The value to use in an Amazon CloudWatch custom metric dimension. This is used in the `PublishMetrics` custom action. A CloudWatch custom metric dimension is a name/value pair that's part of the identity of a metric. 

AWS Network Firewall sets the dimension name to `CustomAction` and you provide the dimension value. 

For more information about CloudWatch custom metric dimensions, see [Publishing Custom Metrics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/publishingMetrics.html

networkfirewall.firewallpolicy.dimension.Description: The value to use in the custom metric dimension.
